message.content:
Navigate to the card-place repository at /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place and get the exact content of MyOrdersDetails screen files from the feature/SPMAIS-32275_ branch.

Run these commands:
1. git show feature/SPMAIS-32275_:src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx
2. git show feature/SPMAIS-32275_:src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx
3. git show feature/SPMAIS-32275_:src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/Models/index.ts
4. git show feature/SPMAIS-32275_:src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/utils.ts

Return the COMPLETE content of each file.

input.command: cd /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place && git fetch origin feature/SPMAIS-32275_ 2>/dev/null; git show feature/SPMAIS-32275_:src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx
input.description: Fetch branch and show MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx content
